title: Webinar
subtitle: An insightful session focused on guiding students toward careers in top tech companies like MAANG. The event provided strategic direction, industry insights, and essential skills required to navigate the competitive hiring landscape successfully.
description:
Title of the event: How to Crack MAANG- Find your path to work for top MNCs like Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, or Google (MAANG) 
 Objective of the event: The objective was to provide attendees with strategic insights and essential skills needed to secure roles in leading tech companies such as Meta, Apple, Amazon, Netflix, and Google. Through expert guidance, participants learned how to navigate the competitive job market and prepare effectively for high-level opportunities.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Career guidance for top tech companies.
Focus: Skills, strategy, and interview preparation
